mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales indicates strengthening household demand and upward earnings revisions, so higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2016-12 was available by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce a positive walk-forward Rank IC over 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and raises equity discount rates, so a meaningful upward crossing in FEDFUNDS predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2016-12 was 0.54 by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional baseline or if mean triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales momentum weakens while FEDFUNDS rises, earnings expectations deteriorate at the same time discount rates increase, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is negative and FEDFUNDS is higher than 3 months earlier
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform both single-series triggers and does not deliver a negative average 60-day forward return in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals recession-risk repricing and weaker future profits, so an upward UNRATE crossing predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2016-12 was 4.7 by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or if downside hit rate is not above the unconditional negative-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects stronger real activity and operating leverage in cyclical earnings, so higher INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2016-11 was available by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of 3-month INDPRO momentum fails to outperform the bottom tercile over 60-day forward S&P 500 returns in rolling walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in housing starts signals weaker construction, durable-goods demand, and credit-sensitive activity, so a downward HOUST crossing predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% from its level 12 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2016-11 was available by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing-start declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns at or above the unconditional positive-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth combined with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income strength without immediate recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases over 3 months and UNRATE falls over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS and UNRATE 2016-12 vintages were visible by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength trigger does not outperform the unconditional 20-day S&P 500 return and does not outperform either PAYEMS-only or UNRATE-only signals.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in consumer prices increases the probability of tighter monetary policy and higher discount rates, so a sharp CPIAUCSL inflation crossing predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth rises above its 12-month growth while FEDFUNDS is higher than 3 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL 2016-11 and FEDFUNDS 2016-12 vintages were available by 2017-01-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-tightening observations have nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if their downside frequency is not above the unconditional 5-day downside frequency.
